name: @meus-exames/mobile
description: Shell Capacitor que embrulha o app web (packages/web) e gera APK/AAB Android

scripts.add:android: npm run build:web && cap add android
scripts.sync: npm run build:web && cap sync android
scripts.apk: echo 'Dentro de packages/mobile: cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug   (app-debug.apk)'
scripts.aab: echo 'Dentro de packages/mobile: cd android && gradlew.bat bundleRelease  (app-release.aab p/ Play Store)'
